mapper.select: /* MarketingMapper.getMarketingSendTarget */ SELECT SEND.SEND_DIVISION ,SEND.CONTRACT_NUM ,SEND.USERID ,SEND.TEMPLATE_ID ,SEND.MOBILE_NO ,SEND.STRT_DTTM ,SUBSTR(SEND.STRT_DTTM, 1, 4) || '-' || SUBSTR(SEND.STRT_DTTM, 5, 2) || '-' || SUBSTR(SEND.STRT_DTTM, 7, 2) AS AGR_DT ,TM.MSG_TYPE ,TM.CALLBACK AS SEND_NUMBER ,TM.SUBJECT ,TM.TEXT AS SEND_MESSAGE ,TM.EXPIRE_HOUR * 60 * 60 AS EXPIRE_TIME ,COUNT(1) OVER() AS TOTAL_COUNT ,ROWNUM AS RN ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') || '093000','YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') + (TRUNC((ROWNUM - 1) / 10000) * (1/24)), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REQUEST_TIME FROM ( SELECT 'MSP' AS SEND_DIVISION ,A.CONTRACT_NUM AS CONTRACT_NUM ,'' AS USERID ,1 AS TEMPLATE_ID ,B.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS MOBILE_NO ,A.STRT_DTTM FROM MSP_MRKT_AGR_MGMT A, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.SUB_STATUS <> 'C' AND A.AGR_YN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN A.STRT_DTTM AND A.END_DTTM AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_DATE(A.STRT_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, 1)) AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(A.STRT_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')) != EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, 1)) AND MOD(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(A.STRT_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')), 2) = MOD(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, 1)), 2) ) SEND, MSP_SMS_TEMPLATE_MST TM WHERE SEND.TEMPLATE_ID = TM.TEMPLATE_ID AND SEND.MOBILE_NO LIKE '010%' AND LENGTH(SEND.MOBILE_NO) = 11

/* MarketingMapper.getMarketingReSendTarget */ SELECT A.SEND_SEQ , A.RCPT_DATA , A.CALLBACK_NUM , A.MSG_TYPE , A.SUBJECT , A.MESSAGE , A.RESERVED01 , A.RESERVED02 , A.RESERVED03
, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') || '093000','YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') + (TRUNC((ROWNUM - 1) / 5000) * (1/24)), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS scheduleTime FROM ( SELECT A.SEND_SEQ , B.RCPT_DATA , B.CALLBACK_NUM , B.MSG_TYPE , B.SUBJECT , B.MESSAGE , B.RESERVED01 , B.RESERVED02 , B.RESERVED03 FROM MSP_SMS_SEND_MST A , AM2X_SUBMIT B WHERE A.SEND_REQ_DTTM LIKE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') || '%' AND A.MSEQ = B.MSG_ID AND A.TEMPLATE_ID = '1' AND B.MSG_TYPE_SECOND = '2' UNION ALL SELECT A.SEND_SEQ , B.RCPT_DATA , B.CALLBACK_NUM , B.MSG_TYPE , B.SUBJECT , B.MESSAGE , B.RESERVED01 , B.RESERVED02 , B.RESERVED03 FROM MSP_SMS_SEND_MST A , AM2X_SUBMIT_LOG B WHERE A.SEND_REQ_DTTM LIKE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') || '%' AND A.MSEQ = B.MSG_ID AND NOT (B.RESULT = '0' OR (B.KKO_RESULT IS NOT NULL AND B.KKO_RESULT = '0')) AND A.TEMPLATE_ID = '1' AND B.MSG_TYPE_SECOND = '2' ) A
